description.title: What is iAgents Hub?
description.body: iAgents Hub is a self-hosted platform for building, managing and collaborating on AI agents. Connect any provider — Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Ollama and more — using your own API key, organise agents into folders, share them with workgroups by dragging a card onto a group, and export to the native format of Claude Code, GitHub Copilot or OpenAI Assistants in one click. Everything from a unified interface, with no data leaving your infrastructure.

github.title: Source code
github.body: iAgents Hub is an open source project. Contributions are welcome.
